name: Green Bean Casserole
directions: place green beans in a greased 2 qt casserole dish.
set aside.
Heat Butter in saucepan,stir in flour,add milk, stirring until smooth.
Add soup and heat.
Stir in cheese.
Pour over beans and mix.
Sprinkle paprika on top.
Bake in oven at 350 for 15 minutes or until heated through

similar.name: Green Bean Cheesy Dinner Party Casserole

name: Weight Watcher Green Bean Casserole
directions: Boil beans for 10 minutes; drain and place into a 9x13x2 pan.
Mix oil and seasoning packet, pour over beans and toss to coat.
Bake at 350 degrees for 30 minutes.
Sprinkle with cheese.
Serve immediatly.

similar.name: Green Bean Cheesy Dinner Party Casserole

name: Cheesy Green Bean Casserole
directions: Pre-heat oven to 350°F.
Mix milk, soup, pepper, and green beans in a mixing bowl.
Put in a 2 qt casserole dish or in three small loaf pans.  (The loaf pans are good for making three sets of two servings if you are just cooking for one or two).
Sprinkle cheese and french fried onions over the top.
Bake for approximately 30 minutes.

similar.name: Green Bean Cheesy Dinner Party Casserole

name: Double Cheddar Green Bean Casserole
directions: In 1 1/2-quart baking dish, combine soup, milk and 1 cup cheese; stir until well blended.
Add beans and 2/3 cup French Fried Onions; mix gently to combine.
Bake at 350°F for 30 minutes or until heated through.
Stir and sprinkle with remaining cheese and onions.
Bake 5 minutes or until onions are golden.

name: Cheesy Green Bean Casserole
directions: Preheat oven to 350 degrees Fahrenheit.
Drain and rinse beans (My mother always taught me to do this when using canned green beans, to get rid of the "can taste").
In 1 1/2 to 2 quart casserole dish, mix together milk and cheese soup.
Stir in drained beans.
Stir in half the french fried onions.
Place in preheated oven and cook 30-35 minutes (use the longer time if you like them a little thicker).
Sprinkle remaining french fried onions over the top.
Return to oven for 5 more minutes.
Serve hot.

similar.name: Green Bean Cheesy Dinner Party Casserole

name: Green Bean Cheesy Dinner Party Casserole
directions: Saute onion in butter until onion is transparent.
Combine onion with cottage cheese, cheddar cheese, bread crumbs, eggs and seasonings.
Place half the cooked green beans in a large buttered casserole dish.
Top with half of the cheese mixture, then remaining beans and cheese mixture.
Bake 30 minutes at 375.

name: Green Bean Casserole
directions: Drain the green beans, and grate the cheese
In a 9x13" baking dish, mix the 4 cans of green beans, mushroom soup, 1/2 lb of cheese and 1/2 can of the french fried onions.  Mix well.
After everything is mixed up, cover the top evenly with the rest of the cheese, and then top with the rest of the onions onions.
Bake for 30 minutes at 400°F, until the cheese is melted and some of the onions are crispy.

name: Cheddar-Pecan Green Bean Casserole
directions: Melt butter in a medium-size heavy saucepan over medium heat; whisk in flour until smooth. Cook 1 minute, whisking constantly. Gradually whisk in 1 1/2 cups milk; cook over medium heat, whisking constantly, 3 to 4 minutes or until mixture is thickened and bubbly. Remove from heat, and whisk in buttermilk and remaining ingredients.
Cook fresh green beans, trimmed, in boiling salted water to cover 4 to 6 minutes or to desired degree of doneness; drain.
Combine Buttermilk Sauce, peppers, and 1/2 cup cheese in a large bowl; add green beans, tossing gently to combine. Place in a lightly greased 13- x 9-inch or 3-qt. baking dish.
Combine French fried onions, Japanese breadcrumbs, chopped pecans, and remaining 1/2 cup cheese, and sprinkle over green bean mixture.
Bake at 350° for 25 to 30 minutes or until golden brown and bubbly. Serve immediately.

similar.name: Green Bean Cheesy Dinner Party Casserole
